mapper.select:
select
from user where username = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or email = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select postId, viewCount, putTime, title, postAbstract, postLikeCount, commentCount, collectCount from v_user_post where userId = #{userId} order by putTime desc
select allLikeCount, allPostCount, allCollectCount, allCommentCount from v_user_post_all_info where userId = #{userId}
select postId, collectId, viewCount, putTime, title, postAbstract, postLikeCount, commentCount, collectCount from v_user_post_collect where userId = #{userId} order by putTime desc
select userId, name, headPortrait, userDestination, postCount, viewCount from v_user_search_like where name like #{content} or userDestination like #{content}
select id, username, name, sex, authority from v_user_permission
select grade, `group` from v_user_team_able order by grade desc
select count(*) as userCount from user where delete_flag = 0 and `group` is not null

select
from user
select distinct `group` from user where delete_flag = 0 and grade = #{grade}
select id,name from user where delete_flag = 0 and grade = #{grade}
select allTeamUserCount, salaryYearAll, copyrightCount, lanQiaoCount, javaCurrent, htmlCurrent, examCurrent, workCurrent, userCount, postB, postG, postJ, postT, javaAll, htmlAll from v_summarize;
select grade, salaryYearPerJava, PeopleCountPerJava, salaryYearPerHtml, PeopleCountPerHtml from v_user_grade_per
select zipcode,peopleCount from v_summarize_zipcode where zipcode is not null;
select ding_user_id as dingID,name,`group`,id as userId from user where ding_user_id is not null and grade between year(now())-1 and year(now()) and delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: update user set ding_user_id = #{DingId} where name = #{name}
update user set is_interview = #{i} where id = #{userId}
